case_title: ROBERT K KAHUANUI III VS. BRAD RICE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY RICE, BRAD KAHUANUI III, ROBERT K

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY BRAD RICE IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $75.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DECEMBER 1, 2010. PAYMENTS SHALL CONTINUE MONTHLY UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
